_meta.notes: Hand-reconstructed (NOT logging-shim captured). Shape derived from task_create_production_shape.json (#612 logging-shim capture); only task id/subject/description/owner were re-parameterized for the parallel-batch scenario. capture_method='synthesized' indicates the fixture may be lossy relative to a live production payload; capture_method='logging-shim' (used by task_create_production_shape.json) indicates a lossless captured shape. TaskCreate PostToolUse stdin for the SECOND task in a parallel-batch fire. Companion to task_create_parallel_burst_first.json. Both task files (id 10 and id 11) are pre-written before the hook is invoked, so count_active_tasks returns 2 when this fixture's PostToolUse hook reads the filesystem. Under positive-bound predicate (count >= 1) the hook emits Arm; start-pending-scan's CronList idempotency absorbs the redundant emit when a matching cron entry already exists from the companion's earlier fire. Under the strict-equality predicate (count == 1) this fixture rejects.

tool_input.subject: Second task in parallel-batch dispatch
tool_input.description: Companion task in the same parallel TaskCreate batch.
